db2-snowflake-convert.description: Convert DB2 SQL files under sql/ to Snowflake SQL using the db2-snowflake-converter subagent.
db2-snowflake-convert.template: Convert the DB2 SQL files under `sql/` to Snowflake SQL. Use the `db2-snowflake-converter` subagent, preserve meaning, write successful output to `output/`, keep failures in `failed/`, and follow `db2_to_snowflake_prompt.md` as the source of truth.

db2-snowflake-retry-failed.description: Retry previously failed DB2 to Snowflake conversions from failed/.
db2-snowflake-retry-failed.template: Retry the DB2 SQL files under `failed/` using the `db2-snowflake-converter` subagent. Preserve previous failure context, write successful output to `output/`, and clean up failed artifacts when safe. Follow `db2_to_snowflake_prompt.md` as the source of truth.
